boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CLOSE-FJO-086 contains all five required elements: batch FJ-86, assay AX-41, criterion Cq<=31, release date 2026-06-28, and assay-acceptance status 'accepted retest result before shipment'. Policy STD-FJO-086-P requires all five elements; all are present and match.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLOSE-FJO-086 proves deviation closure matches batch FJ-86, assay AX-41, criterion Cq<=31, release date 2026-06-28, and assay-acceptance status before shipment.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Dependency satisfied: accepted retest result confirms assay acceptance before shipment.

final_answer: CLOSE-FJO-086 provides the exact source evidence needed. It covers batch FJ-86, assay AX-41, criterion Cq<=31, release date 2026-06-28, and confirms assay-acceptance status with accepted retest result before shipment. This satisfies all five requirements in STD-FJO-086-P. No blockers remain; the clinical batch may proceed to quality release.
